blocks.text: Project: Site Grading Design for {{fact:f:E-2001-001.client}}. Working session held at this office. Minutes taken by Jason Jordan and circulated for correction; corrections received within one week will be incorporated, after which these minutes stand as the record of the meeting.

items: Linda Nguyen, Design Technician, Brackenridge Civil Group Inc
Jason Jordan, Design Technician, Brackenridge Civil Group Inc

blocks.text: The purpose of the session was to review the assembled plan set and the state of the submittal package. The set was reviewed sheet by sheet, in bound order, with the client present. Linda Nguyen ran the review. The set is complete as drawn and is in check.

The set check has turned up the disagreements it was expected to turn up, all of them at the match lines and none of them in the design. Six items are open. Five are lettering and callout disagreements between adjoining sheets and are corrections rather than changes. The sixth is a spot elevation that appears differently on the grading sheet and on the utility sheet. Both cannot be right. The grading sheet is correct and the utility sheet will be brought to it. Debra Vasquez asked whether this meant the utility design was wrong. It does not; the elevation was carried forward from a print that predates the confirmation of the layout, and the design against which the utilities were laid out is the correct one.

The submittal package was reviewed. The drainage computations, the earthwork estimate, and the erosion and sediment control plan are complete and are in the package. The transmittal is drafted. The package is not submitted and will not be until the set check is closed and the cover sheet is sealed. Sealing is the Principal Engineer's and is not scheduled by this meeting; the set goes to him when it is right, and it is not right until the six items are closed.

Debra Vasquez asked what remains after submittal. The answer given was the agency's review, which is outside this firm's control and for which no date can be promised, followed by this firm's response to the agency's comments through the one review cycle the agreement provides. She asked to be copied on the transmittal when the package goes. That was agreed.
No change in scope was requested at this session and none was identified. The site plan has not moved since the utility layout was confirmed, and the set as drawn reflects it.

rows: Close the five lettering and callout items between adjoining sheets
Bring the utility sheet spot elevation to the grading sheet and recheck both
Recheck the set at the match lines after items 1 and 2 are closed
Submit the set for seal once the check is closed
Copy Debra Vasquez on the transmittal when the package is submitted
File the marked-up check prints from this session in the project folder

blocks.text: The check prints from this session are retained. They are the record of what was found and what was done about it, and they stay in the folder after the corrections are made.
